SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 08

JUDGE GEORGE G. TYLER, RSHACKELFORD, REPORTER, ASAUSA, CLERK 3:05PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. CASE SETTLED. ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT LYNX JAGON. GUADALUPE GAMINO ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF AND RICHARD JORDON APPEARING IN PRO PER. TERMS STATED ON RECORD. JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES LOCATED AT 1091 BUSH STREET #214. WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMIDIATELY AND STAY OF EXECUTION UNTIL 11-29-94. IF DEFT VOLUNTARILY VACATE THE PREMISES ON OR BEFORE 11-29-94, PLTF. WILL VACATE JUDGMENT AND DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE WILL BE FILED. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JORDON, RICHARD JAGON, LYNX THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1091 BUSH STREET #214, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL NOV-29-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN ATTORNEY FEES AND COURT COSTS.
